fact.fact: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía has a phone number (+57 1) 2200 300 and is available from Monday to Friday from 7:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
fact.source_text: PBX en Bogotá +57 (1) 2 200 300. De lunes a viernes de 7:00 a.m. a 5:00 p.m. jornada continua.
fact.source_document: Plan Nacional de Desarrollo 2022-2026 - capitulo energetico

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the phone number and hours of operation.

fact.fact: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía has a sede principal at Calle 43 No. 57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia with a Código Postal: 111321 and is open from Lunes a Viernes 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM
fact.source_text: Sede Principal: Calle 43 No. 57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia Código Postal: 111321 Horario de Atención: Lunes a Viernes 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM
fact.source_document: Plan Nacional de Desarrollo 2022-2026 - capitulo energetico

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

fact.fact: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía has a línea gratuita 01-8000-910-180
fact.source_document: Plan Nacional de Desarrollo 2022-2026 - capitulo energetico

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

fact.fact: The Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas - CREG is the entity in charge of regulating the public services of energy, gas, and fuel in a technical, independent, and transparent manner
fact.source_text: La CREG es la entidad encargada de regular la prestación de los servicios públicos domiciliarios de energía eléctrica, gas combustible y servicios públicos de combustibles líquidos, de manera técnica, independiente y transparente
fact.source_document: Plan Nacional de Desarrollo 2022-2026 - capitulo energetico

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

synthesis.content: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía in Colombia has a phone number and a línea gratuita for public inquiries. The Ministerio de Minas y Energía is located at Calle 43 No. 57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia and has specific hours of operation. The Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas - CREG regulates public services of energy, gas, and fuel in a technical, independent, and transparent manner.

sentences: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía in Colombia has a phone number and a línea gratuita for public inquiries.
The Ministerio de Minas y Energía is located at Calle 43 No.
57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia and has specific hours of operation.
The Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas - CREG regulates public services of energy, gas, and fuel in a technical, independent, and transparent manner.
alternate_contents: The Ministerio de Minas y Energía is available from Monday to Friday from 7:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. at phone number (+57 1) 2200 300 and also has a sede principal at Calle 43 No. 57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia. The entity can also be reached through a línea gratuita 01-8000-910-180. The Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas - CREG regulates public services of energy, gas, and fuel in a technical, independent, and transparent manner.

The Ministerio de Minas y Energía in Colombia can be contacted through its phone number (+57 1) 2200 300 or its línea gratuita 01-8000-910-180, and is located at Calle 43 No. 57 - 31 CAN - Bogotá D.C., Colombia. The Ministerio de Minas y Energía is open from Monday to Friday, with varying hours. The Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas - CREG regulates public services of energy, gas, and fuel in a technical, independent, and transparent manner.
